title: Autonomous efficiency tracks
description: Schema for rows in roles/<role_id>/autonomous_efficiency_tracks.csv. Each row describes role-local exogenous efficiency drift that applies automatically to explicit base methods in one milestone year.

role_id.description: Role that owns this autonomous efficiency track.

track_id.description: Stable role-local identifier for the autonomous efficiency track.

year.description: Milestone year represented by this row.

track_description.description: Plain-language description of the autonomous drift.

applicable_method_ids.description: JSON-encoded array of explicit method_id values that the track may modify.

affected_input_commodities.description: JSON-encoded array of affected commodity identifiers.

input_multipliers.description: JSON-encoded array of numeric multipliers aligned with affected_input_commodities.

delta_output_cost_per_unit.description: Additive change to output_cost_per_unit relative to the base method in the same role and year.

cost_basis_year.description: Base year used to normalize delta_output_cost_per_unit.

evidence_summary.description: Short summary of the evidence base.

derivation_method.description: Brief note on how the row was derived, scaled, or interpolated.

double_counting_guardrail.description: Explicit note describing how double counting is avoided.
